name: Rosy Reception Punch
recipeIngredient: 1 (12 oz) can Frozen Grapefruit Juice Concentrate, thawed
1 (2 liter) bottle Lemon-Lime Carbonated Beverage, chilled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart nonmetal container, combine water, grapefruit juice concentrate, and soft drink mix; blend well.
2. Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
3. Just before serving, combine juice mixture and carbonated beverage in a large punch bowl.
4. Serve over ice or float an ice ring in the punch.
5. Garnish as desired.
Yield: 40 1/2 cup servings
